title: Contracts package
goal: Define immutable API and schema contracts used by runtime, telemetry, and gate checker services.
constraints: Keep contracts backward compatible unless explicitly versioned.
Document required fields and examples in schema descriptions.
definition_of_done: Steering payload includes concept, preset, layers, multiplier, and profile_id.
Run metadata schema contains required fields from feedback-loop.md.
rollback_note: If contract changes break downstream consumers, revert to previous contract version and keep old endpoint behavior behind compatibility mode.
